name: transcript-fixer
description: >- Corrects speech-to-text transcription errors using dictionary rules and Claude's built-in AI (no external API key required — Native AI Correction is the DEFAULT). Stage 3 API is a backup for automation without Claude Code. Builds personalized correction databases that learn from each fix, auto-loads person-name ASR variants from your people roster, and reads per-domain context files that prime the AI pass for context-dependent homophones. Triggers when working with ASR/STT output containing r
author: daymade
